vibe: Cinematic, minimalist, exclusive, Apple-style UI, emotionally driven travel brand

headings.usage: H1: text-5xl to text-6xl+ tracking-tighter; H2: text-3xl to text-4xl tracking-tight. DO NOT USE INTER OR BANNED FONTS.

body.usage: text-base to text-lg leading-relaxed. DO NOT USE INTER.

accent.usage: Uppercase, wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]), tiny size (text-xs) for overlines and labels.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8 to p-24 for section paddings. Let elements breathe.
spacing_and_layout.hero_section: min-h-[90vh] or 100vh. Absolute positioned background media with bg-black/40 to bg-black/50 overlay. Content optically aligned. Use a gradient overlay if text needs contrast.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical Tetris grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) for Wellness and Rooms to break standard layouts. E.g., col-span-8 row-span-2 for primary image.
spacing_and_layout.admin_dashboard: Use Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4. Dense, highly functional, Swiss High-Contrast styling. Minimal border-radius.

components.navigation: Sticky, z-50. Must use surface_glass_dark or surface_glass_light depending on page context. 1px bottom border. Include language switcher (SK/EN/DE) and Booking CTA.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid #E2C073 text-black, rounded-none or rounded-sm, hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform. Secondary: Glass or outline with subtle hover backgrounds.
components.cards: For rooms: Avoid standard Shadcn card. Use pure HTML/Tailwind divs with group-hover:scale-105 on inner images, overflow-hidden, and glassmorphism overlays for text. Max 8px border-radius.
components.booking_widget: Floating or docked glassmorphism bar with Shadcn datepicker, select inputs for guests/rooms, and a high-contrast Book Now button.
components.admin_components: Use Shadcn customized for high-density. Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Recharts for analytics if needed.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for momentum scrolling (critical for luxury feel).
animations.reveal: Framer Motion for staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1) on scroll.
animations.microinteractions: Subtle scale on hover for images. Hover text color changes MUST be explicitly defined.
animations.parallax: Use React Spring Parallax or Framer Motion useScroll for subtle background image drift.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='booking-submit-button', data-testid='language-switcher'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend using React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Shadcn UI primitives.
Ensure dark/light mode contrast across marketing and admin views.
Install and use lucide-react for all iconography (Services, Amenities, Admin Sidebar).
Use the exact image URLs provided in the media section. Do not use placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
Apply Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts.
For the admin panel, strip out 'luxury' spacing and use dense, high-contrast utility layouts.
Implement the multi-language UI switcher logic (UI level).
Ensure the hero section implements a cinematic parallax effect.
